title: Top 6 Elevator System Design Software 2026: Vertical Transport Guide
description: Vertical transport planning? Compare Elevate, Lift Design Tool & traffic analysis for 2026. Optimize passenger flow & reduce wait times!
content:
Building elevator system design software: scientific configuration of vertical transportation

The elevator system is the core vertical transportation of high-rise buildings. From elevator configuration to passenger flow analysis, from operating efficiency optimization to energy consumption assessment, elevator system design software helps engineers scientifically configure the elevator system. This article will comprehensively evaluate the mainstream building elevator system design software to help elevator system designers master the scientific configuration tools of vertical transportation.

Elevator system design software Corevalue

Elevator system design software assumes key functions in building design:

  • Elevator configuration: elevator quantity and specification configuration
  • Passenger flow analysis: building passenger flow analysis
  • Operating efficiency: elevator operating efficiency optimization
  • Energy consumption assessment: elevator energy consumption prediction evaluation
  • Comparison of plans: comparison of different configuration plans

In-depth Review: Mainstream elevator system design software

Elevate: The standard tool for elevator traffic analysis

Elevate is a professional software for elevator traffic analysis and is widely used by elevator designers around the world.

Core Features:

  • Elevator traffic calculation
  • Passenger flow analysis
  • Elevator configuration optimization
  • Waiting time evaluation
  • Program comparison function

Traffic analysis:

Elevate's Coreadvantages is an elevator traffic analysis. The software can accurately analyze building passenger flow and optimize elevator configuration.

Waiting Assessment:

The software can evaluate elevator waiting times and optimize passenger experience.

Elevator Traffic Calculator: Elevator passenger flow calculation tool

Elevator Traffic Calculator is a professional software for elevator passenger flow calculation.

Core Features:

  • Passenger flow calculation
  • Elevator demand analysis
  • Peak hour analysis
  • Configuration suggestions
  • Report generation

Passenger flow calculation:

Elevator Traffic Calculator's Corevantages are passenger flow calculations. The software can accurately calculate building passenger flow needs.

Configuration suggestions:

  • The software can provide elevator configuration suggestions based on passenger flow analysis.

Lift Design Tool: a comprehensive tool for elevator design

Lift Design Tool is a comprehensive software for elevator design.

Core Features:

  • Elevator system design
  • Shaft size calculation
  • Machine room design
  • Energy consumption analysis
  • BIM model import

Comprehensive design:

Lift Design Tool's Coreadvantages is a comprehensive design. The software covers elevator configuration, shaft design, machine room design, etc. Complete elevator design.

BIM integration:

  • The software can import BIM models, and the elevator design is integrated into the building model.

Elevator system design software development trend forecast

AI elevator optimization

AI will assist elevator configuration optimization. AI can automatically recommend elevator co nfiguration, optimization design scheme. Design efficiency will be improved.

BIM elevator deepening

Elevator design will be deeply integrated into BIM collaboration. Elevator shafts, machine rooms, etc. are integrated into the building BIM model, and design and construction are seamlessly connected.

Smart elevator analysis

Smart elevator analysis function will be further improved. Designers can analyze the effectiveness of smart elevator dispatching, opti mization operating efficiency.

Energy consumption optimization deepens

The elevator energy consumption optimization function will be more accurate. Designers can accurately evaluate elevator energy consumption and optimize energy-saving solutions.

Purchasing suggestions

When choosing elevator system design software, it is recommended to consider:

  • Analysis needs: Traffic analysis professional needs are suitable for Elevate
  • BIMapplicat ions: BIM projects require BIM integration function
  • Energy consumption requirements: Energy saving assessment requires energy consumption analysis function
  • Building type: Office buildings, hotels, and residences have different needs
  • Budget considerations: Evaluate software costs and training investment

Elevator system design software is a scientific configuration tool for vertical transportation. Choose the appropriate elevator system design software to scientifically configure the building elevator system.
